title: NOAA Climate and Weather Data

official_entrypoints.label: NOAA NCEI Climate Data Online search
official_entrypoints.publisher: NOAA National Centers for Environmental Information

official_entrypoints.label: NOAA NCEI access services
official_entrypoints.publisher: NOAA National Centers for Environmental Information

supported_inputs.dataset: NOAA dataset family such as daily-summaries or GHCN daily
supported_inputs.variables: Weather variables such as PRCP, TMAX, TMIN

verification_hints: Station identity, time range, and variable coverage must be validated downstream.
NOAA API/search entries are source-prior leads, not final evidence.
Access, rate limits, and required tokens must be handled by consuming tools.
Do not use this card as benchmark-case answer data.
access_notes: NOAA NCEI Data Access offers direct downloads and cloud-ready APIs for many data products.
NOAA Climate Data Online web services require an assigned token in the request header.
The current sample-fetch configuration uses a no-token National Weather Service-style JSON payload; CDO/NCEI full API access still needs explicit token support.
Legacy NOAA CDO known_source entries remain source-prior compatibility hints.
NOAA search/API entrypoints may require token, station, variable, and date validation.
future_verification_hints: Confirm dataset id, station identity, variables, date coverage, units, and API access.
Route-agent consumers must run resolver/probe/download/verifier separately.
migration_note: Legacy NOAA known-source entries should become SourceCard metadata and not-final scripts that surface station/time/variable ambiguity.
